title: HitColor X
description: [26.1.x SUPPORT IS HERE!] Fully Custom Hit Color - Toggle Armor Tint - up to 100% Opacity - Hex Support - Presets, lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that lets you fully customize the hurt flash color when entities are hit.
body:
# РЌ╝№ИЈ HitColor X РЌ╝№ИЈ

**Fully customize the hurt flash color on entities INCLUDING their ARMOR.**  
Built for PvP players who want clear, personalized visual feedback during combat.

![The settings screen which you can access through Mod Menu, if you're unable to see the preview or don't have the mod it's okay!! We support commands too which is covered in the section below :) <3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3adebb9b542e525b3dcd574157b39d20781ccd1.png)
---

## Features

### РЌ╝№ИЈ Custom Hit Color
Set any color you want using:
- **RGB sliders:** precise control over red, green, and blue channels
- **[Hex Code](https://htmlcolorcodes.com/color-picker/) Input:** Paste any hex color directly
- **Preset colors:** Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Cyan, Blue, Purple, Pink, Magenta, White, Black

### РЌ╝№ИЈ Armor Tinting
Toggle armor color too. When an entity is hit, their armor flashes the same color as their body. Supports all armor types.

### РЌ╝№ИЈ Opacity Control
Adjust the intensity of the hit flash from 0% (no hit color) to 100% (fully solid). Find the perfect balance.

### РЌ╝№ИЈ In-Game Settings Screen
Open the settings screen from **Mod Menu** to configure everything visually:
- Live player preview with your actual skin (You have to be in a world/server for this feature to function)
- Cycle through armor sets (Current, None, Leather, Gold, Chainmail, Iron, Copper, Diamond, Netherite) with enchantment glint
- Toggle hurt preview on/off to compare with and without the effect
- All changes update in real time

![Custom Hit Color ├Ќ Armor Tint ├Ќ Hex Support ├Ќ 27 Presets ├Ќ Opacity Control ├Ќ Live Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eb4ca981240589768cc03a8f61053545564acb8.png)
---

## РЌ╝№ИЈ In-Game Commands
> No ModMenu? No problem. Configure everything via chat commands:

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/hitcolorx rgb <r> <g> <b>` | Set color by RGB values |
| `/hitcolorx hex <#RRGGBB>` | Set color by hex code |
| `/hitcolorx color <preset>` | Use a preset color |
| `/hitcolorx opacity <0-100>` | Adjust opacity |
| `/hitcolorx armor <on/off>` | Toggle armor recoloring |
| `/hitcolorx reset` | Reset to vanilla defaults |
| `/hitcolorx status` | Show current settings |

---
## РЌ╝№ИЈ Available Preset Colors

| Color | Name | Color | Name | Color | Name |
|-------|------|-------|------|-------|------|
| ­Ъћ┤ | `red` | ­ЪЪа | `orange` | ­ЪЪА | `yellow` |
| ­ЪЪб | `lime` | ­ЪЪЕ | `green` | ­ЪЕх | `cyan` |
| ­Ъћх | `lightblue` | ­ЪњЎ | `blue` | ­ЪїЉ | `navy` |
| ­ЪЪБ | `purple` | ­ЪФљ | `darkpurple` | ­ЪњЌ | `hotpink` |
| ­ЪїИ | `pink` | ­Ъњю | `magenta` | ­Ъф╗ | `lavender` |
| РЮц№ИЈ | `crimson` | ­ЪЕИ | `darkred` | ­ЪфИ | `coral` |
| ­ЪЈЁ | `gold` | ­ЪЕ┤ | `teal` | ­ЪЕх | `turquoise` |
| ­Ъї┐ | `lightgreen` | ­Ъї▓ | `darkgreen` | ­Ъћи | `darkblue` |
| ­ЪЕХ | `silver` | Ргю | `white` | РгЏ | `black` |
---

## РЌ╝№ИЈ Dependencies
- **Required:** Fabric API
- **Optional:** Mod Menu (for the config screen)

---

## РЌ╝№ИЈ Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.21.11-26.1.x
- Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
- Client-side only
